HGSS.099.0000:
Some Trainers rely on a Pokémon’s
potential alone. But you can use items\r
and medicines to help improve a\r
Pokémon’s capabilities.
HGSS.099.0001:
Mountain climbing and Pokémon are
similar in a sense.\f
They both come down to potential!\f
I do not rely on items or medicines
but rather potential and training\r
for battle!
